untranslatable_reason: Flag pattern detection requires visual/structural pattern recognition (support/resistance consolidation, breakout identification) which cannot be expressed through the allowed indicators and operators. The signal specifically requires identifying flag structure (price consolidation) and continuation breakouts, which need multi-bar pattern analysis not available in the indicator set.
translation_notes: Used ADX_14 > 20 as proxy for strong trend context and SMA_50 crossover as directional indicator. True flag pattern detection requires candlestick pattern recognition libraries not available. The 64% success rate (bull) and 23% average rise suggest a 5% stop loss and 30-day max hold based on typical flag breakout parameters. Entry is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT: go long on uptrend breakouts, short on downtrend breakouts.
